Get Involved

Help us make music
accessible to everyone.

Every person who joins our mission helps us reach one more patient. Whether you want to bring our tools to your institution, support our work, or simply share our story , it all makes a difference.

How You Can Help

Find your way to help.

Click any card below to jump to the form and let us know how you would like to be involved.

Partner With Us

Bring Second Wind tools to your hospital, clinic, or rehabilitation center. We work directly with institutions to deploy and support our devices.

Get in touch ›

Request Devices

Are you a music therapist, occupational therapist, or care provider who wants to use our tools with patients? Let us know and we will get them to you.

Request now ›

Donate

Your support helps us print more devices, expand to new hospitals, and continue developing tools that make music accessible to every patient.

Support our work ›

Spread the Word

Share our mission with your network. The more people who know about Second Wind, the more patients we can reach. Every connection matters.

Share our story ›
Contact Us

We would love to hear from you.

Whether you have a question, an idea, or just want to say hello , fill out the form and someone from our team will get back to you within a few days.

Email us at contact@secondwind.info
Palo Alto, California
We respond within 2 to 3 business days
Send us a message

Tell us who you are and how you would like to get involved.

Developed alongside the best in the field.

Our tools were tested and refined in partnership with clinical professionals and music therapists at leading medical institutions.

Adaptive instruments and assistive technology for patients in clinical settings. Music is for everyone.
